channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Honor Magic 8 Pro vs Honor Magic 7 Pro : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone haut de gamme Honor ?
item.description: Après avoir surpris son monde avec l'excellent modèle Magic 8 Lite, voyons comment se défend le Magic 8 Pro face à son incroyable prédécesseur. Pourra-t-il lui piquer la couronne ? Étudions ça dans notre nouveau comparatif.

item.title: Report Says More High-End ‘Ultra’ Apple Products Are On Their Way
item.description: Apple's wallet-friendly era will be short-lived, reporting suggests.

item.title: Ce laptop Asus avec écran OLED 3K 120 Hz + Ryzen AI 9 est vendu au rabais chez Darty
item.description: L’Asus Vivobook S15 OLED s’impose comme une belle opportunité en ce moment chez Darty : il passe à 1 049 euros au lieu de 1 353 euros, une réduction bienvenue pour un ultrabook équipé de la puissante puce Ryzen AI 9 avec 32 Go de RAM et un sublime écran OLED 120 Hz.

item.title: Apple is reportedly looking into 3D printing aluminum iPhones and Apple Watches
item.description: There could be even more 3D-printed Apple products coming in the future. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, Apple is exploring ways to 3D print aluminum to make the manufacturing processes for iPhones and Apple Watches more efficient. Gurman reported that this new production process could specifically change how Apple makes its watch casings as well as iPhone enclosures. It's not the first time Apple has tapped into 3D printing, since both the Apple Watch Ultra 3 and Series 11 were partially built with 3D-printed titanium that's 100 percent recycled. More recently, Apple used its 3D printin...

item.title: Owner of ICE detention facility sees big opportunity in AI man camps
item.description: AI data center developers are increasingly relying on a style of camp popularized as housing for men working in remote oil fields.

item.title: Pete Docter Defends Cutting LGBTQ Content From Pixar Movies With Cowardice
item.description: Apparently, Pixar will happily spend 40 years playing therapist to anyone about anything, but they draw the line at queer people.

item.title: Starlink says V2 satellites will provide ‘5G speeds from space with 100x the data density’ - so get ready for a mobile speed overhaul
item.description: Starlink V2 satellites aim to deliver 5G speeds from space, dramatically increasing data density and supporting hundreds of LTE phones.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Rivian’s R2 gambit
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for all things “future of transportation.”

item.title: Listen to this: Mabe Fratti’s experimental cello pop
item.description: The opening notes of "Kravitz", which kicks off Mabe Fratti's 2024 record Sentir Que No Sabes, are lodged in my brain permanently. It's not a showy album, by any means. But there's something about the buzzing of her cello, plucked as you might an upright bass. The way they ring out before coming to an […]

item.title: Amazon is slashing prices on best-selling vacuums from Dyson, Shark, and Bissell — shop my top picks from $36
item.description: Just in time for spring cleaning, Amazon is slashing prices on best-selling vacuums from Dyson, Shark, and Bissell, and I'm rounding up my top picks from $36.

item.title: I spent a month with the Razer Enki Pro gaming chair, and my butt will eternally thank me
item.description: The Razer Enki Pro gaming chair is a premium gaming chair which is very comfortable, but it will set you back a pretty penny and lacks style.
